code:
import io
import string

let s = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(s)
mut sum = 0
mut count = 0
mut cur = 0
mut sign = 1
mut in_num = false
mut i = 0
while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13 or b == 11 or b == 12
    if in_num
      sum = sum + sign * cur
      count = count + 1
      cur = 0
      sign = 1
      in_num = false
    end
  else if b == 45 and not in_num
    sign = -1
    in_num = true
  else if b == 43 and not in_num
    sign = 1
    in_num = true
  else
    cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
    in_num = true
  end
  i = i + 1
end
if in_num
  sum = sum + sign * cur
  count = count + 1
end
let avg = sum / count
println("avg=#{avg}")
